---
title: "Assignment 3"
author: "Eva Juengling Bean"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| label: load-libraries
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

rm(list=ls())

library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(here)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
#| label: make-data
#| echo: true
#| warnings: false

day <- seq(1,365, by=1)
pm25 <- runif(n=length(day), min=1, max=50)

data <- data.frame(day,pm25)
data$season <- as.factor(ifelse(data$day<=90, "winter", ifelse(data$day>270, "fall", ifelse(data$day>180, "summer", "spring"))))
data$risk <- NA
```

```{r}
#| label: looping
#| echo: true
#| warnings: false

good.thresh <- 12
mod.thresh <- 35.4
data$max.unhealthy.streak <- 0

data$risk[1] <- ifelse(data$pm25[1]<=good.thresh, "good", ifelse(data$pm25>mod.thresh, "unhealthy", "moderate"))

for (i in 2:length(day)){
  if (data$pm25[i] <= good.thresh){
    data$risk[i]="good"
  } else if (data$pm25[i]<= mod.thresh){
    data$risk[i]="moderate"
  } else{
    data$risk[i]="unhealthy"
  }
  if (data$risk[i]=="unhealthy"){
    data$max.unhealthy.streak[i]=data$max.unhealthy.streak[i-1]+ifelse(data$risk[i]=="unhealthy",1,0)
  }
}

```
